steps.title: Use the conversion factor
steps.content: To convert radians to degrees, multiply by $\frac{180^\circ}{\pi}$.

steps.title: Cancel pi and simplify
steps.content: Apply the conversion to the given angle. $$ \frac{7\pi}{20}\cdot\frac{180^\circ}{\pi}=\frac{7\cdot180^\circ}{20} $$ $$ \frac{1{,}260^\circ}{20}=63^\circ $$ The answer is 63.
